title: Senior Investment Banker at South Indian Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at South Indian Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with South Indian Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Tiruchirappalli team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About South Indian Bank:
South Indian Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with South Indian Bank!
